query: Find 10 parcels in Drammen municipality larger than 5000 m² that intersect 200-year flood zones, sorted by distance to the nearest quick-clay hazard zone ascending.

1.description: Fetch Drammen municipality geometry by name

2.description: Fetch parcels in Drammen larger than 5000 m²

5.description: Fetch quick-clay hazard zones in Drammen

6.description: Calculate distance from parcels to nearest quick-clay hazard zone

7.description: Sort parcels by distance to quick-clay hazard zone ascending
